headline: Elavon and Liberis Expand Partnership Enabling Small Businesses to Access Fast Funding
summary: ATLANTA & LONDON, March 31, 2026--Liberis (Liberis US Inc.), a leading global embedded finance platform, today announced an extended partnership with Elavon, a leading payments provider and subsidiary of U.S. Bank (NYSE: USB), to launch Quick Capital, a seamless funding solution for small businesses across Canada.

raw.headline: Elavon and Liberis Expand Partnership Enabling Small Businesses to Access Fast Funding

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on U.S. Bancorp, Lowers Price Target to $65
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Betsy Graseck   maintains U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $72 to $65.

headline: U.S. Bank Enhances Consumer Mortgage Experience For New Homebuilding in Partnership with Built
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, March 31, 2026--U.S. Bank has partnered with Built, the leading AI-native platform for real estate and construction finance, to transform how its consumer mortgage borrowers manage the financing of building a new construction home.

raw.headline: U.S. Bank Enhances Consumer Mortgage Experience For New Homebuilding in Partnership with Built
raw.summary: MINNEAPOLIS, March 31, 2026--U.S. Bank has partnered with Built, the leading AI-native platform for real estate and construction finance, to transform how its consumer mortgage borrowers manage the financing of building a new construction home.

headline: Small Businesses Can Soon Enjoy New Rewards With the Prime Business and Amazon Business Credit Cards
summary: SEATTLE, March 31, 2026--Amazon (AMZN) today announced a new Prime Business Card and a new Amazon Business Card, coming this spring, offering U.S. customers more ways than ever to save along with a suite of new features designed for small business customers. The cards will be issued by U.S. Bank (USB) as part of the Mastercard (MA) network.

raw.headline: Small Businesses Can Soon Enjoy New Rewards With the Prime Business and Amazon Business Credit Cards
raw.summary: SEATTLE, March 31, 2026--Amazon (AMZN) today announced a new Prime Business Card and a new Amazon Business Card, coming this spring, offering U.S. customers more ways than ever to save along with a suite of new features designed for small business customers. The cards will be issued by U.S. Bank (USB) as part of the Mastercard (MA) network.

headline: U.S. Bank, Mastercard take Amazon's small-business cards from Amex
summary: The Minneapolis-based bank will issue the cards, and Mastercard will act as the network provider. American Express formerly ran the e-commerce giant's business credit card programs.

raw.headline: U.S. Bank, Mastercard take Amazon's small-business cards from Amex

headline: U.S. Bancorp (USB) Appoints Toby Clements as Chief Operations Officer
summary: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) is included among the 14 Safest Stocks with Highest Dividends. On March 26, U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) announced that Toby Clements will take on the role of senior executive vice president and chief operations officer. He is expected to oversee client service centers and global operations teams, leading more than 16,000 employees. He will […]
